leadText: The Chipped Pot (Japanese: かけたポット Chipped Pot) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Antique Form Sinistea to evolve into Antique Form Polteageist upon use. This consumes the item.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.
